channel.title: control on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in control on Have an average day :|

item.title: Computer Safety & Fap control.
item.description: A friend of mine recently had her computer pillaged by malware again thanks to her little brother. Like most guys I assume he is enjoying the bounty of the internet to it’s dirty fullness. However since she needs her computer for more than just internet surfing and finds it more than a little disturbing that youjizz.com shows up before youtube.com I offered some advice. Protecting your computer is as easy as 1,2,3.
